name: George Harris' Hot and Sour Celery Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large soup pot, heat 2 cups of chicken broth. Add celery and cover. Steam for 3-4 minutes.
2. Uncover the pot and add the remaining chicken broth, rice wine vinegar, soy sauce, ginger, and red pepper flakes. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 12-14 minutes.
3. Add tofu, sunchokes, jimaca, and scallions. Stir until boiling. Mix cornstarch and water to create a paste. Whisk the mixture into the boiling soup and cook until thickened. Remove from heat. If desired, whisk in egg substitute and sesame oil.
